creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I've generally kept the old versions around because they play differently. 
For example, I can play an 'Elf' in Nethack 3.2, but I can't in newer 
versions.  IIRC the elemental and astral planes have changed too. 

I'm interested to know what your thoughts are on that. 

Converting the slave ports to options sounds good though.  I'll try out the 
patch for that and let you know of any problems I see. 

Thanks for the submission.
